name: google-calendar-event-creator
description: Chrome extension that creates a pre-filled Google Calendar event from the event details on the current web page.

scripts.test:offline: node --test test/unit/extraction.test.js test/unit/calendar-url.test.js test/unit/source-request.test.js test/unit/shipping-files.test.js test/unit/load-order-generated.test.js test/unit/load-order.test.js test/unit/popup-content.test.js test/unit/popup-truncation.test.js test/unit/events-view.test.js test/unit/triage-extractor-request.test.js test/unit/supported-domains.test.js test/extension/toolbar-icon-state.test.js test/extension/toolbar-icon-paths.test.js test/extension/extension-loads.test.js test/uber/shared-constants.test.js

_dependencyNotes.jsdom: Test-only. Provides a DOM implementation (test/harness.js) so the unmodified extractor scripts can be run and asserted against in Node, exactly as they execute in a browser. Not shipped with the extension.
_dependencyNotes.satori: Test-only. Renders the popup's HTML/CSS-subset tree to SVG for UI snapshot tests (test/ui/popup-renderer.js), since it isn't a real screenshot of the popup.
_dependencyNotes.@resvg/resvg-js: Test-only. Rasterizes the SVG produced by satori into a PNG for UI snapshot tests (test/ui/popup-renderer.js).
_dependencyNotes.pngjs: Test-only. Decodes/encodes the PNG snapshots compared in the UI tests (test/ui/popup-snapshots.test.js).
_dependencyNotes.pixelmatch: Test-only. Performs pixel-level diffing between rendered and reference PNGs in the UI tests (test/ui/popup-snapshots.test.js).
